name: nipmod-workspace
description: The package intelligence layer for AI agents.

scripts.build: pnpm --dir nipmod build && pnpm --dir site build
scripts.security: pnpm --dir nipmod security:deps && pnpm --dir site security:deps && pnpm --dir site security:secrets && pnpm supply-chain:check
scripts.test: pnpm --dir nipmod test && pnpm --dir site test && pnpm tools:test
scripts.tools:test: pnpm --dir nipmod build && NIPMOD_SKIP_QUORUM_RECEIPTS=1 node --experimental-strip-types --test tools/telegram-bot.test.ts && NIPMOD_SKIP_QUORUM_RECEIPTS=1 vitest run --config tools/vitest.config.ts --testTimeout 20000
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --dir nipmod typecheck && pnpm --dir site typecheck
scripts.verify: pnpm test && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm security && pnpm public:check
